title: hymenaea oblongifolia var. latifolia
intro: Hymenaea oblongifolia var. latifolia, also known as the East Indian kino tree, is a tropical tree species native to the Indian subcontinent and Southeast Asia. This tree has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Hymenaea oblongifolia var. latifolia include reducing fever, treating wounds, and supporting digestive health. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve extracting its kino, a resinous substance, which can be used to make medicines, such as tonics and infusions, to promote overall well-being and health.
